## Summary

Describe the learner-facing or operational outcome.

## Verification

- [ ] TypeScript passes.
- [ ] Production build passes.
- [ ] Relevant tests or manual checks pass.
- [ ] No secret, private learner data or service-role key is exposed.

## SEO and public-content gate

Complete this section for public route, content, navigation or media changes.

- [ ] Title and meta description are unique and accurate.
- [ ] Canonical URL uses `https://salearn.online`.
- [ ] Index/noindex behavior matches `src/lib/seo-policy.ts`.
- [ ] Public URLs are reachable through crawlable internal links.
- [ ] Sitemap coverage is updated when a public route is added or removed.
- [ ] Structured data matches visible, verified page content.
- [ ] Images include meaningful alt text, stable dimensions and appropriate loading priority.
- [ ] No fabricated `lastmod`, deadline, accreditation, salary, rating, review or eligibility claim was added.
- [ ] Private or learner-specific content is absent from metadata, schemas and sitemaps.

## Evidence

Include screenshots, rendered metadata, validation output or deployment links where applicable.
